execute_process (
    COMMAND bash -c "CC=clang-11 CXX=clang++-11 cmake -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON .; make -j $NPROC"
    WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/googletest
)

file(COPY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/googletest/lib/libgtest.so ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/googletest/lib/libgtest_main.so
    DESTINATION ${CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY} FOLLOW_SYMLINK_CHAIN)

file(COPY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/googletest/googletest/include/gtest
    DESTINATION ${NP_HEADERS_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})

execute_process (
    COMMAND bash -c "CC=clang-11 CXX=clang++-11 cmake \
        -DEVENT__DISABLE_BENCHMARK=ON -DEVENT__DISABLE_DEBUG_MODE=ON -DEVENT__DISABLE_OPENSSL=ON \
        -DEVENT__DISABLE_OPENSSL=ON -DEVENT__DISABLE_SAMPLES=ON -DEVENT__DISABLE_REGRESS=ON \
        -DEVENT__DISABLE_TESTS=ON -DEVENT__DISABLE_MBEDTLS=ON .; \
        make -j $NPROC"
    WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libevent
)

file(COPY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libevent/lib/libevent.so
    DESTINATION ${CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY} FOLLOW_SYMLINK_CHAIN)

file(COPY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libevent/include/event.h
    DESTINATION ${NP_HEADERS_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})

file(COPY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libevent/include/event2
    DESTINATION ${NP_HEADERS_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
